---
title: "EMPACT - Empathy and Sustainability: The Art of Thinking like a Mountain"
sort_year: 2024
year: "2022 – 2024"
status: "Past"
funder: "CREA-CULT-2021-COOP-2"
categories: [Media & Social Media Monitoring, Past]
---

**Year:** 2022 – 2024
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** CREA-CULT-2021-COOP-2
**Research Cluster:** Media & Social Media Monitoring
